intro: Crossotropis arenaria, commonly known as Desert Crossotropis, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the deserts of Africa, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Crossotropis arenaria include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
